_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Windrose
author: nezorflame@gmail.com
description:
Windrose is a survival adventure set in an alternative Age of Piracy.
It features the classic "build, craft, survive" formula along with intense combat and engaging
exploration on land and sea.
startup: PROTON_DISABLE_XALIA=1 proton run ./R5/Binaries/Win64/WindroseServer-Win64-Shipping.exe & WS_PID=$! ; while [ ! -f ./R5/Saved/Logs/R5.log ]; do sleep 1; done; tail -c0 -F ./R5/Saved/Logs/R5.log --pid=$WS_PID

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# steamcmd Base Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
# Image to install with is 'ghcr.io/parkervcp/installers:debian'

## just in case someone removed the defaults.
if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user.\n"
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

## download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps # Fix steamcmd disk write error when this folder is missing
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

# SteamCMD fails otherwise for some reason, even running as root.
# This is changed at the end of the install process anyways.
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## install game using steamcmd (Windows dedicated server)
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAID} ]] || printf %s "-beta ${SRCDS_BETAID}" ) $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAPASS} ]] || printf %s "-betapassword ${SRCDS_BETAPASS}" ) ${INSTALL_FLAGS} validate +quit

## set up 32 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so

## set up 64 bit libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

## Create default R5/ServerDescription.json if it does not exist
## The server auto-creates this on first start; we pre-create it so the panel
## can apply variable values (ServerName, InviteCode, etc.) from the first boot.
mkdir -p /mnt/server/R5
FILE=/mnt/server/R5/ServerDescription.json
if [ -f "$FILE" ]; then
    echo "R5/ServerDescription.json already exists, skipping creation."
else
    echo "Creating default R5/ServerDescription.json..."
    cat > "$FILE" <<'EOF'
{
    "Version": 1,
    "DeploymentId": "",
    "ServerDescription_Persistent": {
        "PersistentServerId": "",
        "InviteCode": "server1",
        "IsPasswordProtected": false,
        "Password": "",
        "ServerName": "Windrose Server",
        "WorldIslandId": "",
        "MaxPlayerCount": 4,
        "UserSelectedRegion": "",
        "P2pProxyAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "UseDirectConnection": false,
        "DirectConnectionServerAddress": "",
        "DirectConnectionServerPort": 7777,
        "DirectConnectionProxyAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "AutoLoadLatestBackupIfHasBroken": true
    }
}
EOF
fi

## install end
echo "Installation completed!"

variables.name: [SERVER] Direct Connection Port
variables.description:
TCP/UDP port used when Use Direct Connection is true. Must be open on both protocols. Default 7777.
Has no effect when direct connection is disabled.

variables.name: [SERVER] Invite Code
variables.description:
Custom invite code players use to find and join your server. Minimum 6 characters, alphanumeric
(0-9, a-z, A-Z), case-sensitive.

variables.name: [SERVER] Password Protected
variables.description: Set to true to require a password to join, false for open access.

variables.name: [SERVER] Max Players
variables.description:
Maximum simultaneous players allowed. Up to 4 is recommended for best performance; 10 players is
supported with adequate hardware (>=16 GB RAM).

variables.name: [SERVER] Server Name
variables.description: The display name of your server shown to players in the browser.

variables.name: [SERVER] Server Password
variables.description: Password required to join the server. Only used when Password Protected is set to true.

variables.name: [SERVER] Region
variables.description:
Preferred matchmaking/relay region. Allowed: SEA, CIS, EU (EU covers both EU and NA). Leave empty
for automatic latency-based selection.

variables.name: [STEAM] Steam App ID
variables.description: Steam App ID for the Windrose Dedicated Server.

variables.name: [STEAM] Beta Branch ID
variables.description: Name of the beta branch to install. Leave empty for the default (stable) branch.

variables.name: [STEAM] Beta Branch Password
variables.description: Password for the beta branch, if required.

variables.name: [SERVER] Use Direct Connection
variables.description:
Set true to use direct TCP/UDP sockets (DirectConnectionServerPort must be reachable). Set false to
use ICE/P2P punch-through (default). Most hosted setups should keep this false unless players cannot
connect via invite code.

variables.name: [WORLD] World Name
variables.description:
Display name for the server world. The first world is auto-created on initial startup. To rename an
existing world, stop the server and edit WorldDescription.WorldName in
R5/Saved/SaveProfiles/Default/RocksDB/<version>/Worlds/<worldId>/WorldDescription.json (a copy is
also kept under RocksDB_v2_Backups/).

variables.name: [WORLD] World Preset Type
variables.description:
Gameplay difficulty preset for the world. Valid values: Easy, Medium, Hard. Custom world parameters
(mob multipliers, combat difficulty, etc.) must be edited manually in WorldDescription.json.
